    C

    canShoot() - Method in class game.Ships.PlayerShip
     
    Cooldown - Class in game.PowerUps
    Power-up that temporarily reduces projectile cooldown time.
    Cooldown(Properties, double, int, int) - Constructor for class game.PowerUps.Cooldown
    Constructs a cooldown reduction power-up.
    create(Properties, int, int) - Static method in class game.PowerUps.PowerUp
    Creates a powerup instance
    create(Properties, int, int) - Static method in class game.Ships.EnemyShip
    creates the correct EnemyShip based on the type string in the properties file.
